creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #13)
> Note that that DR was committed Sep 9 2023.

Well, it is true that was committed about one year plus 3 months ago, but at the time you wrote this it is in -current only. I MFCed it to stable/14 four days ago and MFCed it to stable/13 today.

I think I have to explain why that was not MFCed quickly. When I was working on D39638 the solution just works but is not perfect. I planed to re-work it ( and I'm working on it, I think I'm familiar with VNET enough :) ) but the release of 13.5 is reaching I'm confident the work can be accepted in a short window. So I decide to MFC this working solution, and eventually make it perfect :)
